results.rendered_html:
pratibhid 7 U.
1 To break through, pierce, penetrate.
2 To disclose, betray.
3 To reproach, abuse, censure; pratibhidya kāṃtamaparādhakṛtaṃ  Śi. 9. 58 ;  R. 19. 22. 
4 To reject, disown.
5 To touch, be in close contact with;  Ku. 7. 35.
